历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 40940 → 41129 → 55963 → 54842 → 56712. A significant jump occurred in 2023, with fluctuations in the 5.5–5.7 million range in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is about 56712, showing an overall backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 96 in 2021, 103 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 133 in 2024, 134 in 2025, and 139 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.7% compared to 2025, which has limited impact on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is around 180–198 in recent years, placing it among mid-to-lower tier 211 institutions with a stable level. There have been no significant negative or positive public opinion signals in recent reputation evaluations. The university's Douyin popularity ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure. There are no abnormal filing records, indicating stable overall application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A- or above disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines include plateau medicine, grass science, and ecology, but none have entered the A-level rating, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, popular majors include Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication, which overlap with the university's offerings. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 325,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. This is the lowest in recent years, possibly reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall candidate performance. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Hunan Province, which may somewhat suppress the willingness of Hunan candidates to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 1.3%–1.5%, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings, the intensified competition due to an 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026, the limited enrollment expansion of 3.7% insufficient to offset competitive pressure, and the remote location and average reputation, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 56712. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 58282, with a range of 57782–58782.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校，是青海省唯一一所综合性大学。虽非985院校，但作为西部重点高校，其医学类专业在西北地区具有较强 影响力，对湖南省考生而言属于性价比较高的211医学选项。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预计2026年青海大学医学类最低录取位次约为72767名，较2025年上升约6390名。波动区间预计在72267名至73267名之间。位次继续上行的 主要原因是医学报考热度持续高涨，扩招幅度不足以完全抵消竞争加剧的影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Hunan Province over the past five years are: 40,254 in 2021, 34,869 in 2022, 47,705 in 2023, 52,227 in 2024, and 66,377 in 2025. Overall, it shows a trend of first decreasing and then increasing. The ranking was lowest (easiest to admit) in 2022, then rose sharply for three consecutive years, with an increase of 31,508 places from 2022 to 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition. In terms of enrollment plan: 10 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 21 in 2025, showing a year-on-year expansion trend. The 2026 plan continues to expand to 24, an increase of 3 from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 14.3%, which alleviates the upward pressure on rankings to some extent, but the recent increase in application popularity is faster, so the ranking will still move up slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the '211 Project' and has been selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university. It is the only comprehensive university in Qinghai Province. Although not a 985 university, as a key western university, its medical majors have strong influence in the northwest region, making it a cost-effective 211 medical option for Hunan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology experiencing particularly fierce competition. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, which is relatively remote geographically, but its 211 status and the stable employment prospects of medical majors still attract many Hunan candidates to apply. In 2026, the medical category will enroll 24 students in Hunan, a moderate scale, and the expansion will have a certain diluting effect on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 72,767, an increase of about 6,390 from 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 72,267 and 73,267. The main reason for the continued upward trend in rankings is the sustained high popularity of medical applications, and the expansion is insufficient to fully offset the impact of intensified competition.
